title: astragalus newberryi var. funereus
intro: Astragalus newberryi var. funereus, also known as the Newberry's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health, due to its adaptogenic and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Astragalus newberryi var. funereus are often dried and used to make teas, capsules, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
